overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night in a truck simulator game. The windshield wipers actively clear heavy snow accumulation while the vehicle navigates through light traffic and passes through a brief tunnel section.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snowy highway with windshield wipers active, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: truck traveling ahead in same lane with taillights visible through falling snow

entered.detail: Mercedes truck instrument panel with illuminated gauges and controls
black steering wheel with Mercedes logo at center
illuminated GPS display showing route map and navigation data
side view mirror with snow accumulation showing left lane traffic
side view mirror with snow accumulation showing right side of truck
string of ornamental tassels hanging above windshield
windshield with active wipers clearing heavy snow accumulation
metal highway guardrail covered in snow marking left boundary
metal highway guardrail covered in snow marking right boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's perspective inside a Mercedes truck cabin navigating a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night. Windshield wipers actively clear heavy snow while the dashboard instruments glow with green and red illumination. A truck travels ahead in the distance, its taillights barely visible through the dense snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved snowy highway approaching tunnel infrastructure

events.description: overtaking a slower vehicle on the left side of the highway
approaching tunnel entrance with concrete portal and retaining walls becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the highway while overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car being passed on the left side

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance with concrete walls visible in the distance
snow-dusted concrete walls lining the highway approach
concrete walls with occasional road signs mounted

segments.scene_description: The truck navigates a curved section of snowy highway, overtaking a car on the left. The road ahead reveals the approach to a tunnel, with concrete retaining walls and a dark portal becoming visible through the snow. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm as the vehicle closes the distance to the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel section with concrete walls and ceiling
transition from headlight illumination to artificial tunnel lighting fixtures

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the enclosed tunnel section

notable_agents.action: truck ahead maintaining distance in the tunnel

entered.detail: rough concrete tunnel walls with horizontal construction seams
concrete walls with embedded lighting fixtures
curved concrete ceiling with evenly spaced overhead lights
row of bright artificial lights illuminating the tunnel interior
dark wet concrete road surface free of snow inside the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a concrete highway tunnel, transitioning from the snowy exterior to a sheltered interior environment. Overhead artificial lights replace the darkness of night, illuminating the rough concrete walls and wet road surface. The snow stops falling inside the tunnel, though the side mirrors still carry snow from outside.

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open snowy environment with falling snow visible
returning to darkness illuminated only by headlights and ambient night light

agents.ego_description: continuing highway journey after exiting tunnel, navigating through heavy snowfall

notable_agents.action: truck ahead with red taillights glowing in the snow

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail covered in snow reappearing on left side
metal highway guardrail covered in snow on right side
heavy snowflakes visible in the headlight beams against dark sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the truck re-enters the open highway where heavy snow immediately begins accumulating on the windshield again. The artificial tunnel lighting gives way to the darkness of night, with only the truck's headlights cutting through the dense snowfall. The vehicle continues along the snow-covered multi-lane road, following the taillights of a truck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin as it navigates a blizzard-stricken highway toward the mouth of a tunnel. It begins with the driver's view of a snow-covered multi-lane road at night, where glowing green and red dashboard instruments contrast with the heavy snowfall being cleared by rhythmic windshield wipers. As the vehicle moves forward, the camera tracks a distant truck's faint taillights before the road curves, leading the truck to overtake a car on the left. The scene then shifts as the open highway narrows, with concrete retaining walls appearing through the storm. Finally, the perspective closes in on a dark tunnel portal that looms ahead, marking the transition from the open snowy landscape into an enclosed passage.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a truck transitions from a sheltered concrete tunnel back into a heavy nocturnal snowstorm. It begins with the vehicle entering a highway tunnel, where the darkness of night is replaced by artificial overhead lighting that illuminates rough concrete walls and a wet road surface. As the truck moves forward, the falling snow ceases within the sheltered interior, though remnants of the storm remain visible on the side mirrors. The scene then shifts as the truck exits the tunnel, causing the artificial light to vanish and the dense snowfall to immediately accumulate once again on the windshield. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the dark night, with the headlights cutting through the storm while following the distant taillights of another truck along the snowy multi-lane highway.
